svg.title: OpenKubes Platform Architecture — Contracts and Systems
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture diagram showing openkubes/openkubes as the Platform Distribution layer with Platform Contracts (XRDs, ADRs, Compositions), ok-cluster as the Cluster Lifecycle layer, and ok-linux as the OS Profile layer. Each layer shows its owned contracts and implementations. ok-storage is shown as a planned fourth layer.
svg.text: Each layer owns its contracts. Implementations are swappable.

g.text: Persistent Storage Layer — Rook/Ceph, Longhorn, or NFS
Storage Contract → replaces local-path → enables live migration + redundancy

svg.text: Principle: OpenKubes owns the contracts, not the components.
Talos, CAPI, Crossplane, Argo CD are implementations — swappable as long as they honour the contract.
